    T

    Table - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.common.game
    Represents a table in a poker game.

    Constructs a new Table instance with reference to the parent server and command queue.

    Represents the state of the poker table from the client's perspective.

    Constructs a new empty TableRepresentation with default values.

    Returns a string representation of this record class.

    Returns a string representation of the player, including their name, hand, and chip count.
